case_title: LUZ HOTEL VS. MOHAMMED SULEMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUZ HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SULEMAN, MOHAMMED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 725 GEARY STREET, ROOM 8, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $42.80 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUZ HOTEL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SULEMAN, MOHAMMED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUZ HOTEL SERVED JUL-26-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SULEMAN, MOHAMMED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SULEMAN, MOHAMMED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SULEMAN, MOHAMMED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUZ HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT SULEMAN, MOHAMMED DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUZ HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT SULEMAN, MOHAMMED
